{{Quote|Follow me!|Splitter Of Stones|<ref name="Vision of the Future">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref>}}
'''Splitter Of Stones''' was one of the three [[Qom Jha and Qom Qae|Qom Jha]], along with [[Keeper Of Promises]] and [[Builder With Vines]], to help [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] [[Mission to Nirauan|find the entrance]] to the [[Hand of Thrawn]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*[[Vision of the Future (abridged audiobook)|''Vision of the Future'' abridged audiobook]]
